Sandbox_DynamicHordeEvents_ScalingMode_t: Controls whether horde size increases over time. 1 Off disables scaling. 2 Days survived scales by survived days. 3 Months survived scales by survived months.
Sandbox_DynamicHordeEvents_ScalingInterv: How many days or months must pass before the horde size multiplier increases.
Sandbox_DynamicHordeEvents_ScalingMultip: How much the horde size increases per scaling interval. Example: 25 means +25% per interval.
Sandbox_DynamicHordeEvents_ScalingMaxMul: Maximum scaling multiplier percent.Do not set 100. If you dont want scaling off disable it in scaling mode
Maximum total horde size multiplier. Example: 300 means the horde size can grow up to x3.
Sandbox_DynamicHordeEvents_EnableCatacly: Enables a rare ultra-hardcore horde event with its own timer and warning indicator.
Attempts to force severe weather when a cataclysm horde starts.
Sandbox_DynamicHordeEvents_CataclysmWeat: How long the cataclysm weather event should last. The mod first tries a tropical storm, then falls back to storm, rain, lightning, and custom weather calls if needed.
Sandbox_DynamicHordeEvents_EnableCatacly: Force fog and wind during cataclysm weather
Adds climate overrides on top of the tropical storm: fog, strong wind, heavy clouds and desaturation. Overrides are reset after the cataclysm weather duration.
Sandbox_DynamicHordeEvents_CataclysmFogI: Fog intensity forced during cataclysm weather. 0 disables extra fog, 1 is maximum fog.
Sandbox_DynamicHordeEvents_CataclysmWind: Wind intensity forced during cataclysm weather. 0 disables extra wind, 1 is maximum wind.
Sandbox_DynamicHordeEvents_CataclysmClou: Cloud intensity forced during cataclysm weather. Higher values make the storm look darker and heavier.
Sandbox_DynamicHordeEvents_CataclysmDesa: Visual desaturation during cataclysm weather. Higher values make the world look more bleak and storm-heavy.
Sandbox_DynamicHordeEvents_EnableNormalH: When a normal horde event starts, the player character says a short random warning line above their head.
Sandbox_DynamicHordeEvents_EnableCatacly: When a cataclysm horde event starts, the player character says a more intense random warning line above their head.
